title: Inclusive Interaction, Content, Responsive Design, and Human Evaluation · Product Reasoning Brief: Keyboard Focus
summary: The primary flow works by mouse at one viewport but loses focus, status, meaning, readability, and error recovery for changed devices and users. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pp1 keyboard focus increment in accessible responsive product experience. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Verify complete keyboard operation, logical order, visible focus, focus movement, escape paths, and no traps across state changes.
Structure landmarks, headings, names, instructions, controls, errors, and status around the user task and reading order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]

test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]

recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments

steps.title: Predict Keyboard Focus · Theory Keyboard Focus
steps.instruction:
theory case — The primary workflow works by mouse at one desktop width but loses reading order, focus, status, error recovery, and meaning under changed access needs. The theory variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Verify complete keyboard operation, logical order, visible focus, focus movement, escape paths, and no traps across state changes.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Keyboard Focus contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Keyboard Focus · Theory Keyboard Focus.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for verify complete keyboard operation, logical order, visible focus, focus movement, escape paths, and no traps across state changes. For Predict Keyboard Focus · Theory Keyboard Focus, keep Keyboard Focus connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.code:
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-4
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.
